title: Loot Bundles
description: Find or craft bundle containing random items
body:
For 1.18 and under use https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-bag-mod

This mod adds a loot bundle which can be crafted from loot fragments found in chests or be handed out as quest reward.

The mod is highly configurable with a whitelist, blacklist and disallowed item names.

To blacklist an entire mod's items, add the mod ID to the disallowed item name config.

Support here: https://discord.gg/qSKNemGfKn



[![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
